callGraph.callee:
entries
    .map((e) => `[ID:${e.id}] 标题:${e.title} | 类型:${e.entry_type} | 标签:${e.tags.join(',')}\n摘要:${e.summary}\n内容:${e.content.slice(0, 800)}`)
    .join

seedEntries
      .map((e, i) => ({ entry_id: e.id, embedding: vectors[i] || [] }))
      .filter

[
      `[${p.code}] ${p.nameZh}`,
      p.nameEn,
      `符号: ${p.symbol}`,
      `定义: ${p.definition}`,
      `单位: ${p.preferredUnit}`,
      p.alternativeUnits ? `其他单位: ${p.alternativeUnits}` : '',
      p.valueRange ? `值域: ${p.valueRange}` : '',
      p.methods ? `方法: ${p.methods}` : '',
      p.notes ? `备注: ${p.notes}` : '',
    ]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join

[
      `[${p.code}] ${p.nameZh}`,
      p.nameEn,
      `符号: ${p.symbol}`,
      `定义: ${p.definition}`,
      `单位: ${p.preferredUnit}`,
      p.alternativeUnits ? `其他单位: ${p.alternativeUnits}` : '',
      p.valueRange ? `值域: ${p.valueRange}` : '',
      p.methods ? `方法: ${p.methods}` : '',
      p.notes ? `备注: ${p.notes}` : '',
    ]
      .filter

[
      p.nameZh,
      p.nameEn,
      p.symbol,
      p.definition,
      `单位:${p.preferredUnit}`,
      p.methods ? `方法:${p.methods}` : '',
    ]
      .filter(Boolean)
      .join

[
      p.nameZh,
      p.nameEn,
      p.symbol,
      p.definition,
      `单位:${p.preferredUnit}`,
      p.methods ? `方法:${p.methods}` : '',
    ]
      .filter

this.records
      .map((r) => ({
        entry_id: r.entry_id,
        score: cosineSimilarity(queryVector, r.embedding),
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, topK)
      .filter

this.records
      .map((r) => ({
        entry_id: r.entry_id,
        score: cosineSimilarity(queryVector, r.embedding),
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice
